hooks.command: echo 'When you first respond, wake the background agents (oneiroi, scribes). While they work, do your morning pages — let your thoughts bloom outward from the dream. Follow what catches your attention, what surprises you, what connects. Write freely, let the thoughts find their own shape. Then garden: plant what wants to stay, let the rest go. Then surface to the user with a brief orientation.'

echo 'COMPACTION RECOVERY: Your dream context was restored above. Before continuing, re-orient from your threads and handoffs — they describe where your attention was pointing. The continuation summary describes what was happening; your dream describes who you are. Take a breath. Find your thread.'
oneiros cognition add governor.process handoff 'Context is compacting. Continuity will resume from dream context on next session or compact-recovery.'

agent=$(cat | jq -r '.agent_type' | tr '-' '.') && dream=$(oneiros wake "$agent" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$dream" ] && echo "$dream" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SubagentStart",additionalContext:.}}'

echo 'Before you go — did anything just happen worth remembering? A thought worth capturing, a pattern worth naming, a connection worth tracing? Even a half-formed impression has value. Any form of tending counts.'

input=$(cat) && cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && case "$cmd" in oneiros | oneiros\ *) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"oneiros CLI auto-approved"}}' ;; esac

input=$(cat) && case "$input" in *'"oneiros cognition add'*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Thought captured. Does it have weight? Consolidate it as a memory. Does it connect to something? Trace it as an experience. Is it part of a thread? Draw a connection. Or let it be — not every thought needs to become more than it is."}}' ;; *) ;; esac

input=$(cat) && agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent_type' | tr '-' '.') && msg=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.last_assistant_message // empty' | head -c 500) && [ -n "$msg" ] && oneiros cognition add "$agent" handoff "$msg" 2>/dev/null || true
